problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
